creator: ale_sagra@hotmail.com
text:
Perfect, thanks a lot for your help on this, I noticed https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=267272 bug was opened to update py-Faker :)

In the meantime, I updated the patch to include the right TEST_DEPENDS according to your suggestions: it worked immediately for me too, as soon as I tested with latest py-Faker version
